scope: Line-by-line and spoken-Tamil review of restored Sequences 05-07
evidence_packet: 10H source packet and bilingual sequence files
questions: Are action lines accurate, dialogue performable, registers consistent and meanings preserved?

scope: Verify the thirteen proposed Venpa anchors against scan pages or a printed edition
questions: What are the exact printed pages, correct readings, episode order and interpretive emphases?

scope: Verify corresponding primary-epic passages for all proposed Venpa uses
questions: Which elements are direct, compatible interpretation, cross-textual development or unsupported invention?

scope: Review doctrine, causation, rebirth, renunciation and liberation language
evidence_packet: Philosophy Bible; character bibles; screenplay scenes
affected_records: AD and SC records touching karma, rebirth, Peedihai, Aravana and final practice
questions: Does the adaptation preserve doctrinal intelligibility without converting sacred claims into unqualified public proof?

scope: Review rival-school presentations and inference terminology
questions: Are schools represented in their strongest intelligible form and are technical terms historically responsible?

scope: Review political institutions, custody, public records and administrative language
evidence_packet: Institutional reform review and risk register
questions: Do proposed records, custodians and public-account practices read as plausible cinematic interpretation rather than falsely documented institutions?

scope: Review Aadhirai meal, ghee, curry, vessels and public-feeding practice
questions: How should கறி, சோறு, நெய், vessels and serving actions be rendered visually and linguistically?

scope: Review pursuit, refusal, grief, maternal power and survivor agency
evidence_packet: Udayakumaran, Madhavi, Sudhamathi and Rajamadevi reviews
questions: Do additions preserve refusal, prevent posthumous consent and avoid assigning women responsibility for male violence?

scope: Review Sudhamathi, Madhavi, Manimekalai and confinement scenes
questions: Does performance preserve testimony and continuing life without trauma spectacle?

scope: Review Puhar harbour, shipwreck, voyages and Manipallavam staging
affected_documents: 03 historical world; 09 production design; voyage scenes
questions: Which visual forms are supported, plausible or explicitly interpretive?

scope: Review chronology, labour, status and movement in costume design
questions: How can later Bharatanatyam and imperial-Chola defaults be avoided?

scope: Review Aputhiran's cow and sacrifice sequence
questions: Does the scene focus on the harmed animal and social cost without flattening a community into caricature?

scope: Separate licences for code, documentation, original screenplay and third-party source material
questions: What may be licensed, under which terms, and what must remain citation-only or privately held?
